subcodes.first_line: O Thou Who art privy to the mysteries of the Day of Resurrection! The mystics have been numbered among the ignorant, and they who claim to possess knowledge [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای واقف اسرار یوم نشور عارفان در زمره جاهلان محشور شدند و مدعیان معرفت و
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @empty learning; false spirituality, @firmness in the Covenant
